name: io.github.swperb/imgcli
description: Convert, resize, crop, filter & composite images via the imgcli CLI — a lightweight, dependency-free alternative to ImageMagick/ffmpeg for still images.

environmentVariables.name: IMGCLI_BIN
environmentVariables.description: Path to the imgcli binary if not on PATH (e.g. after `brew install swperb/tap/imgcli`).
